title: astragalus australis var. glabriusculus
intro: Astragalus australis var. glabriusculus, commonly known as the coastal bean or coastal milk-vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Astragalus australis var. glabriusculus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
